title: Auto MLG
description:
Automatically MLG when holding water or powder snow!
Easy and interactive toggle menu included! Now with an optional Auto Mace MLG!
body:
Auto MLG is a data pack that allows you to automatically clutch when you are falling!\
How to use:
- Once the pack is installed, get either a water bucket or powder snow bucket
- Hold it in you mainhand, it doesn't work with offhand.
- Look down (at least 80-90 degrees directly down)
- Jump from 5 blocks or higher
- And then it automatically places it!

This also will never break if you fall too fast, I added special methods to ensure you will always get saved. I fell from 10,000 blocks high and it still clutched!\
You can configure this too, type either /reload and press the config button or do /function auto_mlg:config/config to enable/disable water/powder snow MLG.\

Now the pack has an optional Auto Mace MLG! (Disabled by default)

Example GIFs:\
Water:\
![Water MLG](https://i.imgur.com/nqsOwex.gif)\
Powder Snow:\
![Auto Powder Snow](https://i.imgur.com/t9v0rkh.gif)\
Enjoy!
